text:
EXPLANATION: This is a well-documented, real historical work published in 1785 by the Marquis de Condorcet (Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas de Caritat), printed by De l'Imprimerie Royale in Paris. It is held in the Bibliothèque nationale de France (Gallica), catalogued in the French national library catalogue (CCFr), available on Cambridge University Press, ResearchGate, and sold as a first edition on AbeBooks — all with exact title and author match. Its absence from modern academic databases (Semantic Scholar, CrossRef, etc.) is expected for an 18th-century book predating those systems.
LINK: https://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k1057808s
FOUND_TITLE: Essai sur l'application de l'analyse à la probabilité des décisions rendues à la pluralité des voix
FOUND_AUTHORS: Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas de Caritat (Marquis de Condorcet)
FOUND_YEAR: 1785
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
